location: Guaranteed, one-time drop from a single Valiant Gargoyle found praying beside an Erdtree sapling near the West Capital Rampart Site of Grace in Leyndell, Royal Capital. This enemy does not respawn once defeated.
tactics: The gargoyle stands with three Oracle Envoys near the sapling — pull it away individually if you don't want to fight all four at once.
Awkward stairs near the West Capital Rampart grace can make positioning tricky; try to fight on flatter ground.
This gargoyle does not respawn, so once it's dead the halberd is gone from this spot for that playthrough.
This encounter becomes unavailable later in the story after the Erdtree is burned — get it beforehand if following a late-game route.
lore: The standard bronze halberd of the Valiant Gargoyles, likewise mended with corpse wax — a patchwork weapon fitting for the patchwork guardians who carry it.

builds.name: Pure Strength Halberd
builds.why: C scaling in Strength (higher than most halberds) with only a minor Dexterity requirement makes it one of the stronger pure-Strength picks in the class.
